since_last: 37% of 89 AI names green; AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads +1.00%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 37% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.79% · BTC +0.60% · Gold -0.87% · Nasdaq100 +1.68%. 37% of 89 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure is doing the heavy lifting at +1.00%.

cards.headline: AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at +1.00%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -1.34%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: CRWD is the standout at +8.71%
cards.body: Leaders: CRWD +8.71%, SPCX +2.16%, PLTR +1.89%, NOW +1.81%, MSFT +1.53%. Laggards: MU -3.31%, MRVL -2.86%, CRNC -2.39%, CEVA -2.16%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +2.16% at $174.55
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +2.16% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
